name: Ostrich with Mushrooms and Mustard Shallot Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mushroom mixture: Sauté shallots until softened, add mushrooms and cook until nearly done. Add garlic and white wine, reducing until almost dry.
2. Prepare the mustard shallot sauce: Sauté shallots in butter, deglaze with Pinot Noir, add herbs and Dijon mustard. Stir in venison demi-glace and reduce by half. Whisk in crème fraîche.
3. Season the ostrich medallions with salt and black pepper, then grill until rare to medium rare.
4. Place sautéed mushrooms in the center of a hot plate. Slice the cooked ostrich and arrange around the mushrooms.
5. Spoon the mustard shallot sauce over the meat.
